description: This Java class `JwtService` provides functionality to create and validate JWT tokens, including issuing access tokens for users, parsing and validating tokens, and extracting user IDs from token claims.

classes.name: JwtService
classes.description: Service for creating and validating JWT access tokens, managing secret keys, and extracting user info from tokens.

methods.name: issueAccessToken
methods.description: Generates a signed JWT token for the provided AppUser, including claims for email and roles, with configured expiration.

methods.name: parseAndValidate
methods.description: Parses and verifies a JWT token, returning the claims if valid.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Extracts and returns the UUID user ID from token claims.
